{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004937FC86072A20257E917879"}"},"total":2116},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7573712737248822041","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看的，主角扮猪吃老虎，每个人都挺好的，没有特别坏的，平平淡淡偏日常，希望作者后面写主角高光的场面多一点，带领侯府走向强盛，不要大刀，小小刀一下就可以了，候府后面遇到的困难，主角都可以力挽狂澜。作者大大多多更新[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]","text_exts":[{"e":12,"s":7,"text":"扮猪吃老虎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%80%81%E8%99%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742845787E917879%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227573712737248822041%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227558809412027042878%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%80%81%E8%99%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763394211,"group_id":"7558809412027042878","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7CW+K/lblY2t34B/rIVp6M=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a89b13e9d21044c2a8d495960aa2c33d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873820&x-signature=2fd6uV493TOtrBCvWQmstt8N9Kw%3D","user_id":"607352622692285","user_name":"娇娇小九妹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"607352622692285","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7558809412027042878","book_info":{"abstract":"封砚初刚穿过来，先听见‘啪啪啪’的响声，然后才感受到屁股上传来一阵疼痛，丢人！竟然被扒了裤子挨打！紧接着听见几个嚎啕大哭的声音，旁边还有三个孩子一起被打，嗯，看来是闯祸了，挨打的也不止他一个，丢人的心情略微好了一些。
男主穿越成侯府庶子，原本以为是个小可怜，没想到这侯府的生活还不错，也没人为难，原本想躺在这个富贵窝里安乐地过一辈子，然而天有不测风云，人有旦夕祸福，为了生存，他只能努力拼搏，重新闯出一片天！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/f5e6ee2cdee4061d5af8a9c145a8e8ed","author":"皮小白","author_id":"","book_id":"7558809412027042878","book_name":"侯府郎君躺平失败记","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#808078","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7558809496324162110","read_count":"83073","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"693471"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"349","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,架空,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/00d5fc06f6f892039440bc7aef59c863~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779468578&x-signature=EG6o%2Fzcy0uLju93gXkTk9zKVjYg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2137924779910147","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004937FC86072A20257E917879"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16184,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":30660},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577956213155463998","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真好，很不错的，故事的铺垫很真实，读起来感觉也在旁，感受历史的洪流，一开始是见证者，但却也无能为力。事事用心，慢慢积蓄力量，待到时机成熟也可推波助澜乘风而起"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764384765,"group_id":"7558809412027042878","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwnEHZZlGm3YlNWrUpIA9WE8wgSzSiFpi0x2xq0P4lGZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873648&x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"1846829171086311","user_name":"瘦骨嶙峋的萧战风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1846829171086311","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7558809412027042878","book_info":{"abstract":"封砚初刚穿过来，先听见‘啪啪啪’的响声，然后才感受到屁股上传来一阵疼痛，丢人！竟然被扒了裤子挨打！紧接着听见几个嚎啕大哭的声音，旁边还有三个孩子一起被打，嗯，看来是闯祸了，挨打的也不止他一个，丢人的心情略微好了一些。
